violations.text: The bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorines sanitizing solution for the glasswasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
